Nosferatu (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $95,608,235Details
International Box Office $86,197,410
Worldwide Box Office $181,805,645
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A gothic tale of obsession between a haunted young woman and the terrifying vampire infatuated with her, causing untold horror in its wake.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,652,560 (22.6% of total gross)
Legs:4.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,992 opening theaters/3,132 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $98,373,750

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2024 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: December 25th, 2024 (Wide) (Spain)
December 25th, 2024 (Wide) (France)
December 25th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
December 25th, 2024 (Wide) (Switzerland)
December 26th, 2024 (Wide) (Trinidad / Others Caribbean)
Video Release: January 21st, 2025 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for bloody violent content, graphic nudity and some sexual content.
(Rating bulletin 2861 (cert #54533), 11/20/2024)
Running Time: 132 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Filming location (country): Czech Republic
Geographical setting: Romania
Plot point: Monster, Vampire
Subgenre: Gothic Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Studio 8, Focus Features, Maiden Voyage Films, Birch Hill Road Entertainment
Production Countries: United States, Czech Republic
Languages: English
